MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RIMON HANNA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCE: Douglas B. Provencher, Esq. of Provencher & Flatt LLP 707/284-2380 for pltf & opposing party; Rimon Hanna, 559/709-5777 deft & moving party in propria persona.
RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Plaintiff to submit proposed order denying defendant's motion. If the Court rules otherwise, the Court will issue a minute order. (302/REQ/KD) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647

Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgmnt Disco; And Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
